Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/39dadbe49ae3dbac95ccfaca30ef5013bcc38d9b5c5681fc006c784034365c6b/f93b08db-2200-4c91-b490-9b5dfac15360/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
